title: SO SIMPLE - Change email "sent" name

posts.author: connectrtem (Bonnie)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need a simple way to change the “sent” name on an email.

Right now it takes the beginning portion of your email address and uses that name, but that is such a huge oversight.

If my name is Bob R Smith and my email is BobRSconnect@BobsConstructionbusiness.com…OBVIOUSLY I don’t want to send an email as BobRSconnect…that looks terrible in someone’s inbox. I just want to send it as Bob or Bob Smith.

Every email service I’ve ever used allows you to change the sent name. Why can’t I do it here?
